trade_name: NATIONAL OCCUPATIONAL STANDARD (NOS) COSMETOLOGY AND BEAUTY THERAPY

learning_outcomes.description: Understand delivering service to clients. 1:1 Describe the importance of customer service delivery.

performance_criteria.description: Determine and handle client’s needs in a knowledgeable and friendly way.
Communicate to clients, approximated response time of delivery and meet deadlines in a timely manner.

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to identify repeated customer service problems and options for solving them

performance_criteria.description: Use customer feedback forms.
Assemble and review clients feedback to help improve service delivery e.g. feedback forms, word of mouth etc.
Address customer issues/request based on feedback received.
Describe the importance of phone calls in customer relation service
Identify self politely to the caller with a smile.
Address the caller’s request and assist accordingly or transfer to appropriate person.
Indicate the end of conversation in a courteous and professional way thanking the caller and waiting for the caller to hang up first.
Explain the importance of communication in a workplace
Differentiate the forms of transactional communication e.g. verbal and nonverbal communication in workplace
Identify workplace communication tools e.g. tablets, phones etc.
Describe the different channels of communication in a workplace e.g. conversations, events, messages, graphics, audio, video, meetings etc.
Describe the most common communication styles in the workplace i.e. open, reserved, direct and indirect.
Use the common elements of communication e.g. body language, eye contacts, sign language, facial expressions, posture etc.
Communicate appropriately in the workplace.

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate the art of effective communication

performance_criteria.description: Communicate verbally.
Communicate nonverbally.
Use appropriate communication tools.

units.title: HEALTH AND SAFETY IN COSMETOLOGY AND BEAUTY THERAPY

learning_outcomes.description: carry out risk management In the workplace

performance_criteria.description: Explain risks in cosmetology and beauty therapy.
Identify and classify workplace hazards in cosmetology and beauty therapy.
Communicate any possible dangerous situations to control the risk in cosmetology

learning_outcomes.description: understand chemical, physical, and biological hazards in the workplace.

performance_criteria.description: Describe potential sources of biological, physical, and chemical hazards e.g. (blood borne diseases, skin infections, hazardous chemicals)
Explain the various health problems associated with exposures to hazards in the workplace.
Prepare and keep up to date Hazardous Chemical Register about chemicals stored, handled or used at the workplace.

learning_outcomes.description: Understand skills of health and safety measures in risk control.

performance_criteria.description: Explain electrical installation in the workplace.
Identify risk associated with electrical installation workplace.
Carryout Control on electrical equipment by tagin.

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate positive working relationship with colleagues

performance_criteria.description: Describe team work.
Explain the merits of good team work.
work effectively in a team.
Define organizational code of practice.
Perform in line with organizational ethics or requirement.
Maintain effective participation in a team.
Explain code of conduct as it relates to cosmetology and beauty therapy industry.
Use organizational code of conduct in own practice.
Carryout review of organizational code of conduct in own practice.
Define hair textures.
Identify natural hair texture.
Identify chemically treated hair texture (e.g. relaxed hair)
Explain products for Natural hair texture
Explain products for chemically treated hair types.
Describe the process of hair weaving with extensions.
Prepare work area, and self
Select with the client hair weaving extension style.

Prepare client for hair weaving. • Drape client. • Look out for the scalp disorders in relation to hair weaving. • Section the hair to determine the structure, growth pattern and density for hair weaving with extensions.
Perform hair weaving extension to client desired length
Carryout hair styling and Style client’s attached hair extensions as agreed.
Describe hair braiding with extension.
Prepare work area, self, and client
Prepare extension to client desired length.
Perform braiding with extension as agreed with clients.

learning_outcomes.description: know of chemical treatment by relaxing

performance_criteria.description: Explain hair relaxing as a chemical treatment.
Explain the types of hair relaxing with different relaxers
Prepare work station and client for hair relaxing treatment.
Perform hair relaxing treatment on client using the correct relaxer.
Perform and finish hair style to client desire. 4. 6 Perform health and safety by cleaning up work area and tools.

learning_outcomes.description: Understand and skill of hair weave-on.

performance_criteria.description: Describe hair weave-on.
Prepare self and tools needed for fixing hair weaves.
Perform cornrows on clients prior to fixing weave-on.
Determine the placement of weave on on client’s hair.
Carryout sew-in weaves on client’s hair.
Carryout brushing and style on clients’ hair as agreed.
clean up the client and work area.
Define the term barbing techniques and barbing styles.
Identify the tools for each barbing technique.
Carryout barbing styles.

learning_outcomes.description: know scissors and comb haircut Techniques.

performance_criteria.description: Describe scissor over comb haircut techniques
Prepare oneself, client and area for scissor over comb haircut techniques
Communicate with your client on the look and agreed length for scissor over comb haircut Technique.
Carry out a client scissor over comb haircut Technique.

Carryout cleaning service on: • Client after scissor over comb haircut techniques. • Tools and sterilize after scissor over comb haircut. • Technique on a client. • Work area after carrying out scissor over comb haircut.

learning_outcomes.description: know clipper and comb haircut Techniques.

performance_criteria.description: Describe clipper over comb haircut Technique.
Prepare oneself, client, and work area to carry out clipper over comb haircut Technique on a client.
Carry out a client clipper over comb haircut technique using desired length and style.

Carryout cleaning up service on: • Client after carrying out clipper over comb haircut technique service. • Sterilize tools after carrying out clipper over comb haircut technique service. • Work area after carrying out clipper over comb haircut technique service.
Describe the term hair dyeing.
Explain colour and colour intensity as they relate to hair dyeing.
Communicate with client on colour and intensity on hair dyeing service.
Carry out hair dyeing service on a client using agreed colour, colour intensity and appropriate PPE.

Carryout cleaning services on client by: • Washing client’s hair with warm water and shampoo. • Finish client’s hair with styling after hair dyeing service. • Clean up client and work area after carrying out hair dyeing service.
Explain different makeup looks and face shapes.
Describe the different face shapes.
Identify different tools for makeup services.
Carry out any makeup look on a client.

Prepare oneself and client for brow grooming and shaping.
agree with client on method to use for brow grooming service.
Carry out client brow shaping as a method of grooming the brows.
clean up self, client and tools after brow shaping service.
Explain the term basic makeup application.
Explain colour theory in basic make up application.
Describe types of foundations in basic makeup application.
Explain the process for basic makeup application.
Prepare oneself, client and work area for makeup application.
Prepare the client’s skin for basic makeup application service.
Carry out complete basic makeup on a client.
Describe the term false eye lash.
Describe types of false eye lash.
Describe how to carry out false eye lash application.
Prepare oneself and work area to carry out false eye lash application
Prepare client, false eye lashes to carry out false eye lash application service.
Carry out false eye lashes application on a client using agreed length and type of false eye lashes.
Apply eye liner to finished false eye lashes on a client.
Clean up, oneself, client, work area and tools after false eye lashes application service.

Describe the process of the sauna use.

learning_outcomes.description: understand body message to relax and its benefits

Explain types of massage e.g. head message, full body message, back etc.
Determine the method of massage. Manual and Machine.
Explain the benefits of massage (psychological, physiological).
Determine the appropriate massage for each individual by consultation e.g. deep tissue message, relaxation, pregnancy, Swedish etc.
Set up work area, client, and self for full body message.
Carryout cleaning services after for oneself, client and work area.

Describes types of waxing.
Identify the tools for waxing.

Carry out underarm waxing: • Apply pre-wax treatment. • Waxing on a client. • Apply post-wax treatment.
Carryout cleaning up service on client and work area.

Identify tools and products for facial and various skin treatment.
Use appropriate wipes and face wash to deep cleanse the face

Perform face steaming
Use appropriate mask on the face and clean.
Use appropriate serum or moisturizer to massage the face.
Carryout cleaning service on oneself, client, and work area.
